<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
sysctl -w net.core.bpf_jit_harden=2
</parameter>

<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
find /etc/sysctl.d -type f -name '*.conf' -not -path '/etc/sysctl.d/99-sysctl.conf' -exec sed -i '/^[[:space:]]*(#[[:space:]]*)?net.core.bpf_jit_harden[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*[0-9]*[[:space:]]*.*$/d' {} +
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
echo "net.core.bpf_jit_harden = 2" > /etc/sysctl.d/bpf_jit_harden.conf
</parameter>
</function>
